subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-30
subcodes.first_line: Peter was devoid of all schooling and so untrained that he could not remember the days of the week. He would tie up seven loaves of bread and open one each day.
subcodes.first_line_orig: پطرس از تربیت ظاهری مقدس و مبری بود بدرجه ئی که ایام هفته را نمیتوانست نگاهدارد هفت بستهٴ نان می بست
